upstream_note: v1 fixes the upstream to the OpenAI shape on /v1/messages; every non-openai cell is a translation claim. The full 6x6 (all upstream dialects) is future work.

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200 on POST /v1/messages: bad no choices[0].message

openai-responses.verdict_note: HTTP 500 on POST /v1/responses: bad no Responses envelope (output/output_text/type=response)

anthropic.verdict_note: UNTRANSLATED passthrough byte-identical to the mock's canned anthropic body — the gateway proxied /v1/messages through verbatim instead of translating (HTTP 200)

gemini.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /v1beta/models/anthropic/mock:generateContent: bad no candidates[0].content

cohere.verdict_note: HTTP 404/405 on /v2/chat, then HTTP 500 on fallback /v1/chat: bad no cohere v2 chat envelope (message.content or text)

bedrock.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /model/anthropic/mock/converse: bad no output.message.content (Converse)

hardware: AWS m7g.2xlarge (Graviton3, 8 cores / 32 GB). Gateway pinned to 4 cores, mock+loadgen on the other 4, Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
